title: Golden Globes 2026 Predictions Summary
text: Wagner Moura (The Secret Agent) leads in the Best Actor Drama category and looks to be following the path of Fernanda Torres from last year's awards. The article highlights several possibilities for record-breaking wins: Wagner Moura would become the first Brazilian man nominated in the category, and this marks a significant moment for international cinema at the Golden Globes. The film The Secret Agent is set in 1977 Brazil during the country's military dictatorship. Moura's performance has been receiving critical acclaim and is positioned as the frontrunner in what is considered one of the clearest examples of award season outcomes.
